request: Rank the 4 best Mercedes Benz C Class generations overall across the full production run. Use 4 different generations when available, with one representative version from each generation. If the model has fewer than 4 true generations, use the most important era-defining versions across its history.
title: RANKING THE BEST MERCEDES-BENZ C-CLASS GENERATIONS
close_narration: So, which C-Class generation would you park in your garage?
order_rationale: Ordered from the earliest to the latest generation to showcase the evolution of the C-Class over time.

entries.name: W202 C36 AMG
entries.label: FIRST AMG C-CLASS
entries.one_line_fact: Debuting in 1993 at $52,000, the W202 C36 AMG packed 276 horsepower, marking the first AMG-tuned C-Class and setting a high-performance precedent.
entries.narration: Debuting in 1993 at $52,000, the W202 C36 AMG packed 276 horsepower, marking the first AMG-tuned C-Class and setting a high-performance precedent.

entries.name: W203 C32 AMG
entries.label: SUPERCHARGED V6
entries.one_line_fact: In 2001, the W203 C32 AMG hit the scene at $51,000, boasting a supercharged V6 with 349 horsepower, blending luxury with exhilarating performance.
entries.narration: In 2001, the W203 C32 AMG hit the scene at $51,000, boasting a supercharged V6 with 349 horsepower, blending luxury with exhilarating performance.

entries.name: W204 C63 AMG
entries.label: NATURALLY ASPIRATED V8
entries.one_line_fact: Launched in 2008 for $57,000, the W204 C63 AMG featured a 451-horsepower naturally aspirated V8, delivering raw power and a thrilling driving experience.
entries.narration: Launched in 2008 for $57,000, the W204 C63 AMG featured a 451-horsepower naturally aspirated V8, delivering raw power and a thrilling driving experience.

entries.name: W205 C63 S AMG
entries.label: TWIN-TURBO V8
entries.one_line_fact: In 2015, the W205 C63 S AMG arrived at $72,000, equipped with a 503-horsepower twin-turbo V8, offering a refined yet ferocious performance.
entries.narration: In 2015, the W205 C63 S AMG arrived at $72,000, equipped with a 503-horsepower twin-turbo V8, offering a refined yet ferocious performance.
